status: static prototype with stable buyer route and richer experimental route
root_behavior: Root landing page leads with AI Decision Assurance value and directs visitors to the guided vendor-risk sample.
north_star: Before relying on AI, CyberShield shows whether the recommendation is defensible.
core_workflow: AI-generated recommendation in -> AI Trust Decision Record out
first_proof_point: AI-generated vendor-risk recommendation in -> defensible AI Trust Decision Record out

google_sheets_capture.verification_rule: Browser submission is not proof of row creation. Verify the Google Sheet row before claiming capture success.

release_guardrails: Vendor-risk guided route remains the primary buyer-facing demo.
Richer panels belong on /vendor-risk-next.html until cross-browser performance is proven.
Aegis remains internal for this build.
Trust Kernel may be referenced as supporting architecture, not as the primary public message.
ATDR workbench remains internal inspection only and must not be surfaced as the public demo.
Google Sheets capture is configured through the deployed Apps Script endpoint, but this remains prototype-grade capture, not production CRM infrastructure.
Legacy Trust Kernel remains preserved and is not restored as root.
Do not treat SOC 2 as automatic approval.
Do not treat framework mapping as compliance proof.
Do not return Medium confidence for unsupported out-of-scope inputs.
static_prototype_limitations: No production persistence beyond prototype Google Sheet capture
Browser Print / Save PDF is current PDF path
Google Sheets capture is endpoint-backed but not production CRM infrastructure
